utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check each for full specification: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (address, price, details, status) — fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (loan amount, interest rate, term, monthly payment, down payment, arrangement fee, other fees) — fully specified.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (provider, service, cost, includes) — fully specified.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (provider, service, cost, date, includes) — fully specified.
- setup_services: utility and setup services (service, cost, activation date, includes) — fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (multiple line items including totals and budget fit) — fully specified.
Therefore, all 6/6 items are covered and fully specified.
